title: Rampur Raza Library Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for DEO, Research Assistant and More Posts
short_info: The Rampur Raza Library has released an official notification for the recruitment of 8 Various Consultant and Assistant posts. This recruitment is being conducted for IT Consultant, Account Consultant, Administrative Consultant, Research Assistant (Hindi & Sanskrit), and Typist/Data Entry Operator posts on a contractual basis. Interested and eligible candidates can apply offline by sending the application form to the prescribed address. The last date to submit the application form is 12-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Information Technology/Computer Science/Artificial Intelligence/Data Science, Bachelor's/Master's Degree in Commerce/Accountancy or CA/CS, Bachelor's/Master's Degree in any discipline, Ph.D. in Hindi, Ph.D. in Sanskrit, Bachelor's Degree with Computer Applications Certificate and typing speed
qualification.details: IT Consultant: Bachelor's Degree in Information Technology/Computer Science/ Artificial Intelligence/ Data Science from a recognized University/Institution and a minimum of 5 years' work experience in the IT field in any institution of State/Central Government/ Bodies/ Research Institutions/ Universities or Public Sector Undertakings. Account Consultant: Bachelor's/ Master's Degree in Commerce/ Accountancy from a recognized University/Institution or Chartered Accountant/ Company Secretary and 7 years' experience in the field of Accounts in any institution of State/Central Government/ Bodies/ Research Institutions/ Universities or Public Sector Undertakings. Administrative Consultant: Bachelor's/Master's Degree in any discipline from a recognized University/Institution and 7 years' experience in the field of Administration in any institution of State/Central Government/ Bodies/ Research Institutions/ Universities or Public Sector Undertakings. Research Assistant-Hindi: Ph.D. Degree in Hindi from a recognized University and 3 years' experience in the field of research, translation or manuscript studies. Research Assistant-Sanskrit: Ph.D. Degree in Sanskrit from a recognized University and 3 years' experience in the field of research, translation or manuscript studies. Typist/Data Entry Operator (Hindi): Bachelor's Degree in any discipline from a recognized University/Institution, One-Year Certificate in Computer Applications, 3 years' experience in the relevant field in any institution of State/Central Government/ Bodies/ Research Institutions/ Universities or Public Sector Undertakings, and typing speed of 30 words per minute in Hindi on Computer. Typist/Data Entry Operator (English): Bachelor's Degree in any discipline from a recognized University/Institution, One-Year Certificate in Computer Applications, 3 years' experience in the relevant field in any institution of State/Central Government/ Bodies/ Research Institutions/ Universities or Public Sector Undertakings, and typing speed of 35 words per minute in English on Computer.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Rampur Raza Library Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
